pm_decisions: Accepted agent-skills P0 install from the pinned addyosmani/agent-skills upstream as local capability setup, not completion evidence.
Accepted skill_usage_event.v1 and explicit UNAVAILABLE/NOT_APPLICABLE as the only completion evidence for required skill routes.
Separated skill_routes from tool_routes, worker_routes, and inspector_routes in policy, schema, receipts, and Harness V2 tests.
Accepted worker and inspector reports only as candidate evidence; Stop/gate-issued receipt remains the completion authority.
Rejected catalog text such as frontend/backend as route evidence unless touched path or direct artifact evidence supports the surface.
Accepted live PreToolUse blocking for Class 3/4 control-plane writes when PM preflight or required subagent scheduling is missing.
Accepted Korean operational gate/worktree intent as Class 3 control-plane work requiring worker and inspector route orchestration.
known_limits: This result file is candidate evidence only and is not a gate-issued completion receipt.
Fresh-session hook observations were exercised locally through SessionStart and validation paths; external desktop restart observation remains an operational handoff check when requested.
